Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action

Class FlixelInputBinding

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelInputBinding
public final class FlixelInputBinding extends Object
Immutable description of one source for a FlixelActionDigital. Factory methods are allocation-free after the binding is stored; do not create new bindings inside FlixelState.update(float).

Kinds

  • FlixelInputBindingKind.KEY via key(int) uses Flixel.keys.
  • FlixelInputBindingKind.GAMEPAD_BUTTON via gamepadButton(int, int) uses logical codes from FlixelGamepadInput; slot GAMEPAD_SLOT_ANY maps to anyPressed.
  • FlixelInputBindingKind.POINTER_BUTTON via pointerButton(int, int) uses Flixel.mouse for POINTER_MOUSE, else Gdx.input multitouch.
  • FlixelInputBindingKind.TOUCH_REGION via touchRegion(float, float, float, float) polls normalized screen rects each frame (mobile-style zones).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final int
    a
    Keycode, logical gamepad button, pointer index, or unused.
    final int
    b
    Gamepad slot, mouse button, or unused.
    static final int
    GAMEPAD_SLOT_ANY
    Use with gamepadButton(int, int) when any active slot should count.
    final FlixelInputBindingKind
    kind
     
    final float
    normH
    Normalized touch region height (0..1).
    final float
    normW
    Normalized touch region width (0..1).
    final float
    normX
    Normalized touch region min X (0..1), only for FlixelInputBindingKind.TOUCH_REGION.
    final float
    normY
    Normalized touch region min Y (0..1).
    static final int
    POINTER_MOUSE
    Use with pointerButton(int, int) for the primary mouse pointer (left button typical).

  • Method Details

    • key

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelInputBinding key(int keycode)
      Keyboard key binding.
      Parameters:
      keycode - libGDX keycode (for example Input.Keys.SPACE).
      Returns:
      Binding instance.

    • gamepadButton

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelInputBinding gamepadButton(int gamepadSlot, int logicalButton)
      Gamepad button binding.
      Parameters:
      gamepadSlot - 0..FlixelGamepadManager#MAX_GAMEPADS-1, or GAMEPAD_SLOT_ANY.
      logicalButton - Value from FlixelGamepadInput (for example FlixelGamepadInput.A).
      Returns:
      Binding instance.

    • pointerButton

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelInputBinding pointerButton(int pointer, int button)
      Mouse or multitouch pointer button binding.
      Parameters:
      pointer - POINTER_MOUSE for mouse, else multitouch pointer index.
      button - libGDX button (for example Input.Buttons.LEFT).
      Returns:
      Binding instance.

    • touchRegion

      @NotNull public static @NotNull FlixelInputBinding touchRegion(float normX, float normY, float normW, float normH)
      Screen region in normalized coordinates (fraction of back buffer width and height).
      Parameters:
      normX - Left edge in 0..1.
      normY - Top edge in 0..1 (same orientation as libGDX screen Y).
      normW - Width in 0..1.
      normH - Height in 0..1.
      Returns:
      Binding instance.
